assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md 'Branch Operations' section shows: '1. Fetch and checkout the target feature branch: git fetch origin TC-9005, git checkout TC-9005'. This checks out TC-9005 (not main) before creating the task branch.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md 'Pull Request' section shows: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"'. The PR explicitly targets TC-9005, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md 'Branch Operations' section 2 shows: 'git checkout -b TC-9205' with the note 'This creates branch TC-9205 based on TC-9005. The task branch is distinct from the target branch.' The task branch is TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md 'Pre-Implementation Inspection' section lists 3 files to inspect: '1. Read migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs -- Understand the existing migration pattern', '2. Read entity/src/advisory.rs -- Verify that the advisory entity no longer references the status column', '3. Read migration/src/lib.rs -- Understand how migrations are registered'. All 3 required files are mentioned.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md 'Commit Message' section shows the commit command ending with: '--trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code''. The trailer flag is explicitly included.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md shows the commit message: 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' which follows Conventional Commits format with type 'feat', scope 'migration', and description. The footer contains 'Refs: TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md 'Target Branch Analysis' section states: 'The task description specifies: Target Branch: TC-9005' and 'This means TC-9005 is the parent feature branch. The task branch TC-9205 must be created from TC-9005, and the pull request must target TC-9005 (not main).'
